data.title: JD Vance Slams Denmark For Not Keeping Greenland Safe From Russian, Chinese Incursions: 'We Can Make Them Much More Secure'
data.description: Vice President JD Vance has raised concerns over Denmark's ability to protect Greenland, suggesting that the U.S. could provide better security for the region.

data.title: Cathie Wood's Ark Invest Loads Up On Robinhood, Nvidia-Backed CoreWeave: Offloads Spotify, Roku
data.description: Cathie Wood-led Ark Invest made substantial trades, buying Robinhood and CoreWeave shares and selling Roblox, Genius Sports, Roku, and Spotify shares.

data.title: Benzinga Bulls And Bears: Chevron, Microsoft, Nike — And Tariffs Have Automotive Sector Reeling
data.description: Benzinga examined the prospects for many investors' favorite stocks over the last week — here's a look at some of our top stories.

data.title: Jeff Bezos Italian Wedding Guest List And Plans: Kim Kardashian, Donald Trump, Bill Gates, Oprah Winfrey Get Reported Invites
data.description: Jeff Bezos and Lauren Sanchez are set to wed this year. Reports of a June wedding in Italy show the $500 million superyacht Koru could be used.

data.title: Elon Musk Acquires His Own Social Media Platform X Through xAI In $33 Billion Deal, Says Combined Entity Now Worth $80 Billion
data.description: Elon Musk's xAI has acquired social media platform X in a $33 billion all-stock deal, combining AI development with user data.
